brand_identity.background_style: Aerial Night Cityscape with Heavy Dark Overlay
brand_identity.font_family_primary: DIN Next LT Arabic, Cairo, sans-serif

headings.font: Cairo, DIN Next LT Arabic, sans-serif

typography.notes: Use Google Font 'Cairo' as a fallback for DIN Next Arabic. Import it in index.css if possible.

containers.main_wrapper: flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden bg-slate-950 text-slate-100
containers.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-white/10 bg-slate-950/60 backdrop-blur-xl flex flex-col
containers.right_panel: w-80 flex-shrink-0 border-l border-white/10 bg-slate-950/60 backdrop-blur-xl flex flex-col
containers.header: h-16 border-b border-white/10 bg-slate-950/60 backdrop-blur-xl flex items-center px-6 justify-between sticky top-0 z-50

cards.base: rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md shadow-lg transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#006C5B] hover:bg-[#005a4b] text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-lg shadow-emerald-900/20 transition-all active:scale-95 border border-white/10
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#C8A86B] text-[#C8A86B] hover:bg-[#C8A86B]/10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/5 text-slate-300 hover:text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.icon: h-9 w-9 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 text-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-colors

inputs.base: bg-slate-950/50 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent focus:border-accent/50 transition-all

effects.noise: pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]
effects.glass_highlight: absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-px bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-white/20 to-transparent

charts.style: Minimal, Donut with thin stroke, Dark tooltip bg

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Replace the entire content of NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx with the new design structure.
2. Ensure the background image covers the full viewport with a heavy dark overlay to ensure text readability.
3. Use Lucide-React icons for all iconography.
4. Implement the Bento Grid layout for the 'Overview' section.
5. Use 'Cairo' font from Google Fonts. Add import to index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cairo:wght@300;400;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap');
6. Apply glassmorphism to all panels (Sidebar, Right Panel, Cards).
7. Use the primary color #006C5B for primary actions and key data points.
8. Use the accent color #C8A86B for highlights, borders, and secondary actions.
9. Maintain all functional requirements: Source management, Chat, Studio outputs.
10. Ensure RTL readiness in structure (though UI is English, use flex-start/end logically).
11. Do NOT delete any logic hooks or state variables. Re-integrate them into the new UI.
12. All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
13. Add the noise texture overlay for a premium filmic grain effect.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
